name: Appliance Store
description: Appliance retail — inventory, staff scheduling & order fulfillment

workflows.name: Low Stock Alert
workflows.treeXml: <taskTree schema_version="1.0" version="1"><request><task name="Start" id="start" definition_id="system_start_v1" x="200" y="50"><version>1</version><configured>true</configured><defers>false</defers><deferrable>false</deferrable><visible>true</visible><parameters></parameters><messages><message type="Complete"></message></messages><dependents><task type="Complete" label="Low Stock" value="@values['Status'] == 'Low Stock' && @values_previous['Status'] != 'Low Stock'">utilities_echo_v1_1</task></dependents></task><task name="Log Low Stock" id="utilities_echo_v1_1" definition_id="utilities_echo_v1" x="200" y="200"><version>1</version><configured>true</configured><defers>false</defers><deferrable>false</deferrable><visible>true</visible><parameters><parameter id="input" label="Input" required="true" tooltip="" menu="">LOW STOCK ALERT: <%= @values['Product Name'] %> (SKU: <%= @values['SKU'] %>) now at <%= @values['Quantity'] %> units. Reorder level: <%= @values['Reorder Level'] %>. Updated by <%= @submission['Updated By'] %> at <%= Time.now.utc.iso8601 %></parameter></parameters><messages><message type="Complete"></message></messages><dependents></dependents></task></request></taskTree>

workflows.name: Order Status Change
workflows.treeXml: <taskTree schema_version="1.0" version="1"><request><task name="Start" id="start" definition_id="system_start_v1" x="200" y="50"><version>1</version><configured>true</configured><defers>false</defers><deferrable>false</deferrable><visible>true</visible><parameters></parameters><messages><message type="Complete"></message></messages><dependents><task type="Complete" label="Status Changed" value="@values['Status'] != @values_previous['Status']">utilities_echo_v1_1</task></dependents></task><task name="Log Status Change" id="utilities_echo_v1_1" definition_id="utilities_echo_v1" x="200" y="200"><version>1</version><configured>true</configured><defers>false</defers><deferrable>false</deferrable><visible>true</visible><parameters><parameter id="input" label="Input" required="true" tooltip="" menu="">ORDER <%= @values['Order Number'] %> status changed: <%= @values_previous['Status'] %> -> <%= @values['Status'] %> for customer <%= @values['Customer Name'] %>. Updated by <%= @submission['Updated By'] %> at <%= Time.now.utc.iso8601 %></parameter></parameters><messages><message type="Complete"></message></messages><dependents></dependents></task></request></taskTree>

workflows.name: Service Ticket Created
workflows.treeXml: <taskTree schema_version="1.0" version="1"><request><task name="Start" id="start" definition_id="system_start_v1" x="200" y="50"><version>1</version><configured>true</configured><defers>false</defers><deferrable>false</deferrable><visible>true</visible><parameters></parameters><messages><message type="Complete"></message></messages><dependents><task type="Complete">utilities_echo_v1_1</task></dependents></task><task name="Log New Ticket" id="utilities_echo_v1_1" definition_id="utilities_echo_v1" x="200" y="200"><version>1</version><configured>true</configured><defers>false</defers><deferrable>false</deferrable><visible>true</visible><parameters><parameter id="input" label="Input" required="true" tooltip="" menu="">NEW SERVICE TICKET <%= @values['Ticket Number'] %>: <%= @values['Appliance'] %> (<%= @values['Brand'] %>) for <%= @values['Customer Name'] %>. Priority: <%= @values['Priority'] %>. Created by <%= @submission['Created By'] %> at <%= Time.now.utc.iso8601 %></parameter></parameters><messages><message type="Complete"></message></messages><dependents></dependents></task></request></taskTree>
